implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Coach independently executes test files written by testing tasks
Test failures produce actionable Coach feedback
Tasks that only create test infrastructure (conftest.py) don't false-fail
Unit test verifies the updated profile

completion_promises.evidence: Updated DEFAULT_PROFILES[TaskType.TESTING] in guardkit/models/task_types.py to set tests_required=True. The coach_validator.verify_quality_gates method already respects this flag — when tests_required=True, it reads quality_gates.all_passed or quality_gates.tests_failed and fails the gate if tests failed.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Coach independently executes test files written by testing tasks
completion_promises.evidence: The Coach's run_independent_tests method (coach_validator.py:3026) already executes pytest against detected test commands. With tests_required=True for TESTING tasks, the verify_quality_gates method (line 2307) will no longer skip the test gate. The test command detection logic (_detect_test_command) finds test files from the player report's tests_written field.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test failures produce actionable Coach feedback
completion_promises.evidence: The Coach's _feedback_from_gates method (coach_validator.py:6411) produces feedback based on QualityGateStatus. When tests_required=True and tests_passed=False, it returns actionable feedback including the test output summary from run_independent_tests. No changes needed — this is pre-existing behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: zero_test_blocking remains False (don't block if no test runner available)
completion_promises.evidence: Added zero_test_blocking=False to the TESTING profile in DEFAULT_PROFILES. The _check_zero_test_anomaly method (coach_validator.py:5479) respects this flag — when False, it produces a warning instead of a blocking error.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tasks that only create test infrastructure (conftest.py) don't false-fail
completion_promises.evidence: The _detect_test_command method (coach_validator.py:4754) filters out conftest.py files from test detection since they provide fixtures rather than being standalone test files. When no runnable test files are found, run_independent_tests returns tests_passed=True with a 'skipped' command. This is pre-existing behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test verifies the updated profile
completion_promises.evidence: Updated 5 existing tests in tests/unit/test_task_types.py to assert tests_required=True and zero_test_blocking=False for the TESTING profile: test_create_testing_profile, test_for_type_returns_testing_profile, test_default_profiles_testing_configuration, test_get_profile_with_testing, test_workflow_testing_task. All 123 tests pass.
